reviews.review_title: It’s okay depending on what station.
reviews.review_description: I usally play core lobbies or even passers. Anytime I join i get greeted with eithee toxicity or people being nice, (most of the time it’s toxicity) i have witnessed girls get SA’d infront lf staff and staff Dont do anything about it, people saying homophobic slurs to LGBTQ+ people, and racial slurs and no action is taken. Myself have been called racial slurs and have been SA’d, despite my efforts to get them banned they DONT GET BANNED. All of the toxic kids of gorilla tag have gone to here. It has gotten to the point where I stopped playing Orion drift entirely for this reason.

I've been playing this game since launch and sure I get some toxicity here and there but a simple fix is just leaving the lobby or switching arenas. I love the quests and how challenging they can get as well as the diverse options of movement. It's a very easy game to learn and getting good at it isn't that hard either. I hope this review helps some people download this game I've loved for quite some time now.

This game has a lot of positive people, but there are some people who isn’t as nice but who cares, this game is an easy game for everyone if you played gorilla tag, anyway I love this game and I will definitely be playing this and making videos about this game every time I play it.

I want to love this game so much because I’ve been a loyal Echo Arena and Gorilla Tag player so this is right up my alley. I’ve been trying to be a loyal player to OD too but it hasn’t worked out at all. My first reason is the servers. I’ve had multiple instances where the server I was in crashed six times within 45 minutes of playing. How do you run a game with this issue!?!? Plus, these servers are the most laggy thing I’ve ever touched. I have a $500 headset capable of 120fps and is RUINED with these 60fps ahh servers. The second reason is scraprun. This game mode is so dang fun but PLEASE, I BEG OF YOU, REMOVE THE IMPULSE GRENADES FROM SPAWN. WE ARE SUFFERING BECAUSE OF THESE GRIEFERS!!!! Yeah, ummm, well that’s it for my review. Fix the game please and I promise you SO MANY PEOPLE will come back to the game.

reviews.review_title: game is great but the lag is horrible
reviews.review_description: The game itself is very fun and even better with a good lobby with nice people. The lag just ruins it all, I usually play driftball and the lag is just ruining everything. Almost every lobby I go into, there are people complaining about lag not being able to do anything about it. As of 5/26/2026, The lag is the worst i've seen and i have been playing since around week 8 of the weekly parkour.

Dear Orion Drift.

It’s incredibly frustrating when a game you actually enjoy is ruined by a toxic community, especially when people decide to target how you talk rather than just focusing on the gameplay. You shouldn't have to "brace yourself" or feel self-conscious just to use a microphone; that kind of behavior says way more about their maturity than it does about you. To protect your peace, try adopting an "instant mute" policy the moment someone gets disrespectful, or stick to private party chats with friends to bypass the lobby noise altogether. Finding a dedicated squad through "chill" or "non-toxic" Discord servers can also completely flip the script, turning a stressful experience into the fun hobby it’s supposed to be. You have every right to take up space in the gaming world, so don't let a few bored, loud people convince you to stay quiet.

I play this for a long time but I got banned for no reason so I got on and I bought some stuff and I got off but then after a week later it shows that I got banned fix your game and plus to much toxicity and I grind it every single day to get all this cosmetics ruined so I'm very very mad 😡😡😡😡😡 I'm not spending no more money on this stupid game 😭😭😭

reviews.review_title: ODVR Review ( thousands of hours on OD )
reviews.review_description: So I have been playing this game for more than a year now starting in its early development during CEA. This game is super fun having tons of sports to play, basically you have the gorilla tag physics but with balls and thrusters on your hand to essentially fly and drift, the movement system is similar to gorilla tag but unique enough to make it pretty easy to learn with help from a friend and a new unique fun experience to have, you can play this game competitive as well which is always super fun. If your an echovr fan I recommend you try z drift out because it’s basically echo. Only real downside to this game is that it has had a good amount of “bad” updates that are basically just bug fixes or cosmetics but other than that it’s an amazing game, you should try it out.

reviews.review_title: Devs do not seem to care for the game.
reviews.review_description:
I would give the game a five star, but it is almost unplayable in its current state. Every update has created more lag, glitches, and unnecessary changes that completely ruin the experience. I have tried to have hope that everything might get fixed but they only add more ways to give them money.
Today I tried to play the game and it crashed 8 times BEFORE I could even get into a server. Once I finally did get into one, the whole server crashed after about five minutes.
The developers say they are focused on increasing performance and stability of the game but nothing reflects that.

reviews.review_title: Why I am starting to hate this game.
reviews.review_description: Actually HATE the new voice moderation system. I literally get banned for no reason, and for some reason when I’m already banned it STILL gives me voice warnings, mutes me for even longer, yea I would love it to be removed or fixed. That’s why I am starting to not like this game.

I got banned because my brother was on my headset and he was spamming the n word he is now permanently banned from my vr can you please unban me because this game is very good. The only reason I gave you a 5 Stars because the moderation is kind of trash but good also I like the game so much that I just wanna play It a lot.  Can you please unband me the game is too fun.

There is some toxic players though,to deal with them just don’t listen if there annoying you too much join a different server so yea itoshi out.

The moderators need to step up their game. I was playing ranked the other day and someone chatted saying I was good and I Smurf (I’m silver 3) and I’m not. Now I’m banned for 3 months because they didn’t check if I was actually a Smurf they just instantly banned me

I Cant Even Go Into A Public With Someone Doing Messing with Me For No Reason All They Wanna Do Is Mock My Voice And Just Make Fun Of It And Yet There Was A Acc In The Lobby With Me And He Didn't Do Nothing I Swear To God If Anyone Makes Fun Of My Voice One More Time Im Gonna Lose It😭😭

Pretty Good Game. My only complaint is the Parkour. For someone le me that loves Parkour, it's like the challenges (including weekly) just love to mess with you. Some challenges it feels like you win by either thinking outside the box or by luck.
Also the Weekly Race Gold & Silver time NEED to be extended. Not everyone is gonna be able to get Gold on stuff like this and that's okay, but for someone like me who's a Hardcore Parkour type of guy, the Weekly Race is genuinely unfair. Like in some cases, I scratch the surface of getting Silver, like I make it to Silver by a thread. When it comes to the Weekly Races, Silver is sometimes treated like a Gold Medal cause how tough it is to get it. If it's tough to get Silver, then it's tough to get Gold and I can promise you that.
Also as for the Week 67 Parkour... You're not funny...

The Physics and the lag are so bad you barely can play the game without going insane. Everytime you touched the ball it wether just randomly flies out of your hand or you lag spike and the ball just falls down. Also the game skips every 2nd frame. You lag everytime. No matter what you do. I had 30 ms once and it completely lagged out for no reason. Also, the ball is lagging. Idk how you achieve this in UE but its making me crazy. The devs should just stay in unity imo cs they couldnt even fix the lag for literal months.

The game is amazing but the community SUCKS! it has an even worse community than any other game I've ever played (I've played gtag in 2023) So if you are playing this game you have to be ready for some racial slurs comming your way! Its like as if a war had been started just because you existed the way some fully grown ahh man comes up to me JUST to call me thhe n word and rage bait (if you could call it that) and then furthermore starts to harass me and say every cuss i could think of and also makes fun of my name, my voice, and my overall apperence (dissing it when hes wearing the EXACT same thing!) Fix YOUR game!!!! If I ever become a mod I would fix this problem soo quick so if a mod is reading this please do something about it! (I'm in EU servers) oh and ITS SOO LAGGY. Its so laggy that i cant even hold the ball! So please. Fix your game.🫩😠😤👎🙏🙏🙏🙏

Honestly, I love orion drift, its a really fun game, great community (sometimes, ill get into that later) fun games, etc. If you play gorilla tag, its alot like it, but you can fly, you have wheels on your hands, which can make you carve, your a robot instead if a gorilla, overall its a fun game, especially after school when your all stressed, orion drift helps me calm down. Now, for the problems. There is a TON of toxicity, and moderation really isn’t the best. About every drift ball match has someone talking trash about another person.  Next, the updates. I really did love the new club update, its a really fun and good update. But, some updates kinda suck. Most of the updates in game are new cosmetics, and i mean, they arent the best. I really want to see more bigger sized updates, more than just cosmetics. And my final point is, servers. I really want there to be private servers, so you can actually do 1v1’s with your friends, and theres not a little kid ruining it. I get that there are some empty servers, but usually they get filled up. Also, if you just wanna play around alone, or your a content creator, it would be better to make videos, and check out things easier without anyone annoying you. Also, sorry one more thing. When you turn in ghost mode for someone, it should make it so that other players cant hang onto you, or be able to hit your ball. Hopefully you’ll listen to this AA, just suggesting.

Yo if you haven’t played this game honestly just save your headset the storage I’m still gonna play it because I’ve spent money on it but like if you like games with horrible communities, getting called slurs and other stuff like that then this game is for you. But I can’t forget about this lag. Ever single server I’ve been in has crashed within 20 minutes of me joining like honestly they have said at least 20 times that they are going to fix the lag they still haven’t. Like honestly if you like horrible communities getting called slurs and horrible lag with your servers crashing then you’ll love this game.

reviews.review_title: Community is mid for drift ball.
reviews.review_description:
Before I would have rated this five stars, but the community isn’t good. I was playing about 1 minute ago and I said, “I’m gonna get off, the ball keeps going through my hand.” While playing drift ball, then everyone there were saying, “Yeah leave no one wants you here.” So here I am. Off on my phone writing a review. By the way, I was on for at most, 4-5 minutes. 

So that’s what I don’t like, here’s the good parts. The game doesn’t have to be parkour or driftball, driftball is what I mostly do but you can run around the circle with your ball or invite a friend to play with you. There is also arcade games in a building!
You can fly up to space, or play basketball!


This game is super fun with friends so, hop on your headset and invite some people! Thats all I can tell you but, go look at some other reviews too.

I love this game because of the different sports that you can do.It also don't like this game because if the  toxic people and disrespectful people but is still a fun game to play
 This game is better than gorilla tag.

This was a Nice ￼Experience the movement games Community and especially the world building I loved every single thing I looked at it looked amazing even though the graphics were okay I think that it is one of the best scenery in vr.￼

I could go on for hours and hours and hours and hours and hours and hours and hours about how this game is amazing, but I really can’t right now cause I don’t have the time. This game is amazing and it also has a lot of people that are nice and some people are bad, but moderation gets to the problem really quick, which is also five stars. I love all the amazing game modes just like Z drift, scrap run and drift ball. Also you guys should definitely give Claire_Tacobell a really big promotion bc she is sooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooo awsome.￼

There’s some good players that can help you,but there is also bad players.

This game is absolutely so fun. I love the mechanics and some of the players they actually help you with the things you wanna learn and I learned a new trick yesterday from someone that actually taught me how to play and now I’m level 19. ￼

reviews.review_title: Such potential but laggy and money hungr
reviews.review_description: Honestly could be one of the best vr games out but people just done play this game because the just want money and won’t fix their lag making the game unplayable at times, multi million dollar company caring more about their income than fixing their game. This entire lag problem has been going on for more than 6 months btw and the game refuses to fix ts. Game has so much potential and could be a lot better. For example with the lag: the ball phases through you, random freezes, randomly kicks you out the game, getting put into a ghost server(joining a high player lobby and it just you being there) the ball launching itself out of your hands and there’s probably more than that. Games worth it but will make you angry from lag.

The game is really good I mean it's like one of the best games I ever played and my favorite game but its just that every time I try to load it up it's saying that the connection was mail formed and there was a JSON object error so if you are reading this around can you please fix my account so I can go back to playing your good game

Orion Drift is a standout VR experience, offering an immersive, free-to-play social multiplayer adventure across vast, seamless space stations filled with up to 200 players. Its has a variety of diverse game modes—from competitive PvP battles and inventive social sports like driftball to casual hangouts, massive community events, skill challenges, and parkour exploration—keeping the gameplay fresh and endlessly replayable with fluid, arm-driven movement and deep customization. Polished, vibrant, and community-driven, Orion Drift is truly a five-star game that redefines VR social gaming—highly recommended for everyone.

reviews.review_title: Very fun game and very entertaining.
reviews.review_description: This game is extremely fun but has two issues im not very fond of. The fact that they kinda just throw you out on your own and it doesn't teach you slightly more tough skills like ceiling carving or simple platforming. The need for slightly more skill based challenges would be good too but the challenges are easy to learn. But overall, 9/10 game great for entertainment and playing with friends.

Before open EA, I remember I was absolutely DYING to play this game, and it was such a good game for a couple months, but after the parkour district revamp, the updates just got worse. There isn’t that much to do other than driftball, and even though CTB is super fun, nobody ever plays it. The Ares update got me excited because I thought they would add a lot more and a new ships and all that, but this new ship only had 4v4 driftball arenas, which let’s be honest, feels exactly like 3v3. Also, the textures look like someone did the driftball district really well but completely forgot to texture the entire other ship until February 24th. The new models and textures just, putting it plainly, terrible. The club district could be so cool, but it just looks like a green mess. All over the ship are models that are overlapping and have gaps all over, which makes the whole experience feel low quality. I guess I’m just saying that, for a game with this much hype before EA, the devs really slacked on a whole lot.

*club update edit*
Ok the new club is cool, but now it feels like driftball isn’t the point of the game anymore. I thought this game was supposed to be a futuristic, social, and fun VR game, but it really seems like Ender and the rest of the team forgot about that part.
It could really be better.

I've been playing for a while since it was only soccer and now I love the new update, I love the baseball and kickball game mode and just enjoy it, and the volleyball is so fun, I just love the new update ❤️.
overall a good game but they exchange for hypercubes could be less driftium and would make the game easier for newer players to get cosmetics

reviews.review_title: The best VR E-Sports game by far!
reviews.review_description:
The graphics look amazing, you can see that the developers put a lot of effort into this game.
The gameplay itself isn't perfect with some lag-spikes here and there but for most of the time the game runs smoothe.
Something that does bother me a bit are the prices in sparks supplies. I mean, 3500 driftium for a rock is CRAZY.

Long story short, the game looks great and runs relatively smoothe, the cosmetics are getting expensive though.

This game is awesome!!! Even though there are some people who aren’t nice it’s fine because as soon as there is a bad person the whole lobby is on them and reporting them for bullying or griefing. This game is really cool because in every lobby there is more and more community friend ships being made because the game brings people together in a way that other games can’t. And thats just a couple reason why the game is awesome. If I stated all of the reason then I might make this review the size of a dictionary

Everybody is so kind I could even broke my controllers how kind they are. And and when I just started somebody saw me and said are you a new player I said yes and then he started to teach me how to play now we are friends with him.Orion drift it's the most kind game ever why do you need to fix some glitches. 
And the rating 5/5👍😊

already starting this review, i know some no lifes are gonna complain. “Oh, dude, you just suck!” “Get better lil bro!!” and yeah i’m a hypocrite but seriously. first thing i notice when starting out is the “intros” that do NOT properly introduce anything. it’s more of a speedrun trying to get the chips. not great for starters. second, the toxicity in this game is more than just slurs. it's like you just committed the START of a world war as a soldier. got called the n word the second i tried playing basketball with someone. lastly, most of the game is overall incomprehensible to new people. the movement, the gameplay of the districts are just harder to understand than infinity + pi. i know and understand that this is an early access game, but THIS coming from a studio that has made another CURRENTLY top selling game is just upsetting.
